## Problem

What EPUB workflow, CLI task, or API use case would this help with?

## Proposed solution

Describe the behavior or interface you would like epubkit to support.

## Alternatives considered

Mention any workaround or existing tool you have tried.

## Extra context

Add examples, EPUB version details, related standards, or sample command/API shapes if useful.
